SAF max number of record - SAF only support this number of records.
MerchantCategory - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTap
Digit merchant code referring to the category of the merchant as defined by the networks.
MerchantCategoryCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
A Merchant Category Code (MCC) is a four-digit number listed in ISO 18245 for retail financial services.
MerchantDecision - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Merchant decision to the current transaction.
MerchantID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.ApplePayVAS
Max 5 merchant ID’s connect by '#'.
MerchantKey - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
Deprecated. 
MerchantName - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTap
Merchant name
MerchantTaxID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard
The merchant tax id.
MerChantTaxID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.TaxDetail
When Tax Type is 00 Unknown or 01- Federal/National Sales Tax , this field is merchant’s federal tax ID.
When Tax Type is 07 - Value Added Tax (VAT), this field is merchant’s VAT registration number.
MerChantTaxID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse.TaxDetail
When Tax Type is 00 Unknown or 01- Federal/National Sales Tax , this field is merchant’s federal tax ID.
When Tax Type is 07 - Value Added Tax (VAT), this field is merchant’s VAT registration number.
